data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the presence of an optional scoring/evaluation mode for quiz/assessment behavior. However, the evidence provided does not include any concrete API reads or persisted state checks that confirm the implementation of this feature. The linked use case mentions the need for this scoring/evaluation mode but lacks specific evidence of its existence, indicating a clear gap in requirement coverage.
gaps: No evidence of an optional scoring/evaluation mode for quiz/assessment behavior.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add evidence for scoring/evaluation mode
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete API endpoints and assertions that verify the existence of the optional scoring/evaluation mode.
